title: Pneuma Brand Identity
description: Brand assets for Pneuma Skills — logo concepts, icon variations, and visual identity explorations. Warm neon-orange (#f97316) on deep dark backgrounds, blending humanistic warmth with technical precision.

items.title: Abstract Flame Mark
items.prompt: A minimalist abstract logo mark for 'Pneuma' (meaning breath/spirit). Stylized flame shape composed of overlapping translucent layers in neon orange (#f97316) and deep amber (#ea580c) gradients on pure black (#09090b) background. The flame subtly suggests a speech bubble or thought balloon — representing the 'breath' of AI communication. Clean geometric construction, no text, suitable for app icon at 64px. Professional brand identity design.

items.title: Flowing Breath Lines
items.prompt: A modern logo mark for 'Pneuma' — three flowing curved lines suggesting breath or wind, transitioning from neon orange (#f97316) to warm gold (#fdba74). Lines flow from left to right, creating a sense of dynamic movement and creative energy. Deep zinc-black background (#09090b). Minimalist, single-color gradient, no text. Corporate tech brand identity, vector-clean edges.

items.title: Layer Stack
items.prompt: A geometric logo mark representing Pneuma's 4-layer architecture. Four horizontal rounded rectangles stacked with slight offset, each layer progressively more opaque — from translucent orange-10% at bottom to solid neon orange (#f97316) at top. Suggests both a document stack and a tech stack. Deep black background (#09090b), clean edges, no text. Modern SaaS brand identity.

items.title: Clean Wordmark
items.prompt: The word 'Pneuma' in a clean, modern sans-serif typeface (similar to Plus Jakarta Sans). Neon orange (#f97316) text on deep black (#09090b) background. Slightly heavier weight on the 'P', subtle letter-spacing of -0.02em. Below the wordmark, a thin horizontal line in orange-20% opacity. Professional tech brand typography, no icon, centered composition. Wide format.

items.title: Glow Wordmark
items.prompt: The word 'Pneuma' rendered with a soft neon glow effect. Letters in warm white (#fafafa) with a diffused orange (#f97316) glow halo behind them, creating a warm luminous feeling against deep black (#09090b) background. The glow suggests the 'ethereal tech' aesthetic — spiritual meets digital. Subtle mesh gradient in background with orange and purple undertones. Modern brand identity.
